# ISTools: Infectious Spatiotemporal Transcriptomics Tools

## Overview

ISTools is an R-based toolkit designed to provide a unified and
efficient framework for spatial transcriptomics analysis in infectious
diseases, built upon the Seurat object. While spatial transcriptomics is
increasingly applied to explore disease mechanisms, including infection,
a standardized analytical framework and user-friendly tools tailored for
infectious disease research remain lacking. ISTools addresses this gap
by defining a comprehensive analytical pipeline specifically for
infection-related spatial transcriptomics data. The toolkit encompasses
four main applications: accurate detection of infection sites,
characterization of the infection microenvironment, single-sample Niche
analysis, and cross-sample comparative or temporal analysis. By
integrating these functions into a cohesive framework, ISTools enhances
researchers’ ability to interpret and mine infection-related spatial
transcriptomics data with both rigor and ease.

![](reference/figures/README/Graphic_abstract.png)

Graphic abstract

### Key Features:

- Unified Analytical Framework: Provides a standardized pipeline
  tailored for infection spatial transcriptomics data storage,
  management, and processing.
- Accurate Infection Site Detection: Enables precise localization of
  pathogen-infected regions.
- Microenvironment Characterization: Facilitates identification and
  analysis of the infection microenvironment.
- Niche and Comparative Analysis: Supports single-sample Niche analysis
  as well as multi-sample comparison or time-series analysis.

## Installation

### Configure mirrors

To ensure stable and fast installation, users may configure CRAN and
Bioconductor mirrors depending on their location.

``` r
# Recommended for users in China
options("repos" = c(CRAN="https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/CRAN/"))
options(BioC_mirror="https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/bioconductor")

# Recommended for users outside China
options("repos" = c(CRAN="https://cloud.r-project.org"))
options(BioC_mirror = "https://bioconductor.org")
```

### Prepare library path

Given the number of dependencies, it is strongly recommended to use an
isolated library path.

``` r
.libPaths("./library_ISTools/")  # modify as needed
.libPaths()
```

This prevents conflicts with existing R environments and improves
reproducibility.

### Pre-installation requirements

Before installing ISTools, we recommend manually installing a small set
of core system-dependent packages that are frequently associated with
installation failures.

Installing them in advance can significantly reduce the likelihood of
installation errors.

``` r
# Core system-related dependencies 
install.packages("openssl") # may fail due to network or SSL configuration; retry if necessary 
install.packages("curl") # required for data transfer and remote access 

# Core R infrastructure 
install.packages("rlang") # >= 1.1.7, required by tidyverse ecosystem 
install.packages("Matrix", type = "binary") # >= 1.6.5, required for sparse matrix operations
```

### Install ISTools

``` r
if (!requireNamespace("remotes", quietly = TRUE)) {
    install.packages("remotes")
}

remotes::install_github("YulongQin/ISTools")
```

> Installation from source is recommended and may take approximately
> 20–30 minutes depending on system configuration.

If the installation fails, please refer to the [installation
tutorial](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTools/articles/01_Installation.html)
for manual dependency setup

## Quick Start

You can click
[here](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTools/articles/00_Quick_Start.html)
to access the quick start tutorial, which provides a concise overview of
the main functions and workflow of ISTools.

For a more detailed step-by-step guide, please refer to the following
tutorials:

- [01_Installation](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTools/articles/01_Installation.html)
- [02_PreProcssing](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTools/articles/02_PreProcssing.html)
- [03_Background_correction](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTools/articles/03_Background_correction.html)
- [04_Infection_spot_detection](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTools/articles/04_Infection_spot_detection.html)
- [05_Infection_niche_detection](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTools/articles/05_Infection_niche_detection.html)
- [06_SingleSampNiche_analysis](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTools/articles/06_SingleSampNiche.html)
- [07_MultiSampNiche_analysis](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTools/articles/07_MultiSampNiche.html)

## Resources

### Project

- GitHub Repository: Access the source code and contribute to ISTools on
  [GitHub](https://github.com/YulongQin/ISTools.git).

### Tutorials

- Online Tutorial: For a comprehensive guide on using ISTools, visit our
  [tutorial website](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTools/).

### Raw data

- Gene_Geneset: A dataset containing gene and gene set information,
  available in the [R
  package](https://github.com/YulongQin/ISTools/blob/d305ee31337ee7290981a50ed08cd74746a1ff70/data/Gene_Geneset.rda).
- Raw data: You can access the Raw data used in the tutorial from the
  [Figshare repository](https://doi.org/10.6084/m9.figshare.31839988).
  Some data are unavailable or partially available due to constraints
  set by the original authors. Please contact the original authors for
  data access requests.

## Citation

If you use ISTools in your research, please cite:

Qin Y (2026). *ISTools: Infectious Spatiotemporal Transcriptomics
Tools*. <https://github.com/YulongQin/ISTools.git>,
<https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTools/>,
<https://github.com/YulongQin/ISTools>.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`AddInfo()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/AddInfo.md)
  : Add information to IST object
- [`AddMetaColumn()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/AddMetaColumn.md)
  : Add columns to existing metadata
- [`AddMetaData()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/AddMetaData.md)
  : Add metadata to IST object
- [`AddMSNicheCells()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/AddMSNicheCells.md)
  : Add columns to MultiSampNiche cells
- [`AddSSNicheCells()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/AddSSNicheCells.md)
  : Add columns to SingleSampNiche cells
- [`AddSSNicheGenes()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/AddSSNicheGenes.md)
  : Add annotations to SingleSampNiche genes
- [`annh5ad2rds()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/annh5ad2rds.md)
  : Convert AnnData h5ad file to Seurat rds file
- [`anno_SingleR()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/anno_SingleR.md)
  : Annotate Cell Types Using SingleR
- [`as.IST()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/as.IST.md)
  : Convert Seurat object to IST object
- [`as.Seurat.IST()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/as.Seurat.IST.md)
  : Convert IST object to Seurat object
- [`CalNicheAggIndex()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/CalNicheAggIndex.md)
  : Calculate Niche Aggregation Index
- [`CalNicheCellComm()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/CalNicheCellComm.md)
  : Calculate Niche Cell Communication using CellChat
- [`CalNicheCoLoc()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/CalNicheCoLoc.md)
  : Calculate Niche Co-localization using MISTyR
- [`CalNicheComposition()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/CalNicheComposition.md)
  : Calculate Niche Cell Type Composition
- [`CalNicheDEGs()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/CalNicheDEGs.md)
  : Calculate Niche Differential Expression Genes
- [`CalNicheGeneCor()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/CalNicheGeneCor.md)
  : Calculate Niche Gene Expression Correlations
- [`CalNicheGeneTrend()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/CalNicheGeneTrend.md)
  : Calculate Gene Expression Trends Across Niche Regions
- [`CalNicheGRN()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/CalNicheGRN.md)
  : Calculate Niche Gene Regulatory Networks using NicheNet
- [`CalNicheOSE()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/CalNicheOSE.md)
  : Calculate Niche Organization and Spatial Entropy (OSE)
- [`CalNichePPI()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/CalNichePPI.md)
  : Predict Niche Protein-Protein Interactions
- [`CalNichePredict()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/CalNichePredict.md)
  : Predict Niche Types or Properties
- [`CalNichePseudo()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/CalNichePseudo.md)
  : Generate Pseudo-time Analysis for Niche Development
- [`clog()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/clog.md)
  [`clog_start()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/clog.md)
  [`clog_end()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/clog.md)
  [`clog_SS()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/clog.md)
  [`clog_MS()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/clog.md)
  [`clog_step()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/clog.md)
  [`clog_loop()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/clog.md)
  [`clog_args()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/clog.md)
  [`clog_normal()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/clog.md)
  [`clog_title()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/clog.md)
  [`clog_warn()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/clog.md)
  [`clog_error()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/clog.md)
  : Logging functions for pipeline execution
- [`COLOR_DIS_CON`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/COLOR_DIS_CON.md)
  [`COLOR_LIST`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/COLOR_DIS_CON.md)
  : Predefined color palettes
- [`CompareNiche()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/CompareNiche.md)
  : Compare two niche detection results
- [`CorrectBackgroud()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/CorrectBackgroud.md)
  : Correct background expression in spatial transcriptomics data
- [`CreateMultiSampNiche()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/CreateMultiSampNiche.md)
  [`CreateMSNiche()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/CreateMultiSampNiche.md)
  : Create a MultiSampNiche object for cross-sample comparison
- [`CreateSingleSampNiche()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/CreateSingleSampNiche.md)
  [`CreateSSNiche()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/CreateSingleSampNiche.md)
  : Create a SingleSampNiche object from analysis results
- [`GeneEnrichment()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/GeneEnrichment.md)
  : Perform Gene Enrichment Analysis (GO/KEGG or GSEA)
- [`Gene_Geneset`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/Gene_Geneset.md)
  : Gene and Geneset File Structure
- [`GetCoordInfo()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/GetCoordInfo.md)
  : Get coordinate-related column names
- [`GetGeneStat()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/GetGeneStat.md)
  : Calculate summary statistics for selected genes
- [`GetInfo()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/GetInfo.md)
  : Get information from IST object
- [`GetMetaData()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/GetMetaData.md)
  : Get metadata from IST object
- [`GetMetaInfo()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/GetMetaInfo.md)
  : Get metadata information
- [`GetMSNicheCells()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/GetMSNicheCells.md)
  : Get MultiSampNiche cells
- [`GetMSNicheGenes()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/GetMSNicheGenes.md)
  : Get MultiSampNiche genes
- [`GetMSNicheInfo()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/GetMSNicheInfo.md)
  : Get MultiSampNiche information
- [`GetSapThreshold()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/GetSapThreshold.md)
  : Retrieve sample-specific thresholds from previous analyses
- [`GetSSNicheCells()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/GetSSNicheCells.md)
  : Get SingleSampNiche cells
- [`GetSSNicheGenes()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/GetSSNicheGenes.md)
  : Get SingleSampNiche genes
- [`GetSSNicheInfo()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/GetSSNicheInfo.md)
  : Get SingleSampNiche information
- [`GetTopGenes()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/GetTopGenes.md)
  : Identify top expressed genes in the dataset
- [`GOID2Genelist()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/GOID2Genelist.md)
  : Convert GO IDs to Gene Lists
- [`IST-class`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/IST-class.md)
  [`IST`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/IST-class.md) :
  The IST Class
- [`IST-options`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/IST-options.md)
  : IST package options
- [`IST_analysis-class`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/IST_analysis-class.md)
  [`IST_analysis`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/IST_analysis-class.md)
  : The IST_analysis Class
- [`IST_info()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/IST_info.md)
  : Get IST package information
- [`IST_options()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/IST_options.md)
  : Set IST package options
- [`MultiSampNiche-class`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/MultiSampNiche-class.md)
  [`MultiSampNiche`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/MultiSampNiche-class.md)
  : The MultiSampNiche Class
- [`NicheDetect_Lasso()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/NicheDetect_Lasso.md)
  : Interactive lasso selection for ROI (Region of Interest) detection
- [`NicheDetect_Spot()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/NicheDetect_Spot.md)
  : Spot-level niche detection
- [`NicheDetect_STS()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/NicheDetect_STS.md)
  : Automated ROI detection using density-based spatial clustering
- [`NicheExpand()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/NicheExpand.md)
  : Expand niche regions based on distance threshold
- [`parse_gtf()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/parse_gtf.md)
  : Parse GTF File into Tidy Data Frame
- [`Plot_DistLine_Exp()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/Plot_DistLine_Exp.md)
  : Plot Gene Expression Along Distance from Niche Center
- [`Plot_DistLine_Ratio()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/Plot_DistLine_Ratio.md)
  : Plot Cell Type Ratio Along Distance from Niche Center
- [`Plot_NicheCellComm()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/Plot_NicheCellComm.md)
  : Plot Niche Cell Communication Results
- [`Plot_Spatial()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/Plot_Spatial.md)
  : Create spatial plots for IST data
- [`print(`*`<IST>`*`)`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/print.IST.md)
  : Print method for IST objects
- [`rds2annh5ad()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/rds2annh5ad.md)
  : Convert Seurat rds file to AnnData h5ad file
- [`RemoveMetaColumn()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/RemoveMetaColumn.md)
  : Remove columns from existing metadata
- [`RemoveMetaData()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/RemoveMetaData.md)
  : Remove metadata from IST object
- [`SetInfo()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/SetInfo.md)
  : Set information in IST object
- [`Seurat_pipeline()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/Seurat_pipeline.md)
  : Standard Seurat Analysis Pipeline for Spatial Transcriptomics
- [`SingleSampNiche-class`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/SingleSampNiche-class.md)
  [`SingleSampNiche`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/SingleSampNiche-class.md)
  : The SingleSampNiche Class
- [`SpotDetect_Gene()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/SpotDetect_Gene.md)
  : Detect infection spots based on individual gene expression
- [`SpotDetect_Geneset()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/SpotDetect_Geneset.md)
  : Detect infection spots based on gene set scores
- [`theme_common()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/theme_common.md)
  : Common analysis theme
- [`theme_spatial()`](https://yulongqin.github.io/ISTtools/reference/theme_spatial.md)
  : Spatial plot theme
